message:
feat(conformance): extend differential engine and tests for FT-P2C-008 NN state

Enhance the ft-conformance differential conformance engine to properly
support FT-P2C-008 NN state contract verification with improved helper
functions, corrected idempotence checks, and comprehensive test coverage.

Differential engine changes:
- Fix prefix normalization idempotence check: replace comparison of
  applied_once == applied_twice with !applied_twice, since true
  idempotence means the second normalization pass should be a no-op
  (applied_twice must be false), not merely that both passes agree on
  whether they applied
- Suppress unused variable warning for applied_once binding by renaming
  to _ in the prefix_normalization branch
- Reformat multi-line call expressions for nn_state_is_valid_key,
  log_string_vec_field, and log_bool_vec_field to satisfy rustfmt

New helper functions:
- log_string_vec_field: extract Vec<String> from StructuredCaseLog
  extra_fields, replacing inline extraction logic
- log_bool_vec_field: extract Vec<bool> from StructuredCaseLog
  extra_fields for training_flag_transition traces
- nn_state_differential_evidence_refs: dedicated evidence reference
  list for FT-P2C-008 differential reports pointing to contract table,
  threat model, unit/property report, and differential packet artifacts

New tests:
- packet_e2e_microbench_nn_state_produces_percentiles: verify that
  FT-P2C-008 packet e2e microbench produces valid p50/p95/p99 latency
  percentiles
- packet_e2e_microbench_nn_state_legacy_vs_optimized_profiles: compare
  legacy vs optimized packet e2e microbench profiles for FT-P2C-008
  to detect performance regressions across code paths
- differential_nn_state_adds_metamorphic_and_adversarial_checks: assert
  that the differential report includes metamorphic state export order
  invariant, adversarial assign shape rejection, hardened allowlisted
  drift for non-strict missing/unexpected keys, and prefix normalization
  idempotence in both strict and hardened modes
- Extend allowlist_fixture_roundtrip test to verify FT-P2C-008
  nn_state.non_strict_missing_unexpected entry loads correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
